3054050.name: Books Upon Books - Bookshop Simulator Demo
3054050.description:
Books Upon Books

A casual, simulation game in which you get to design, build upon, and upgrade your very own bookshop, before tending to it's customers during the day!

Demo

In the demo, you will only have access to the regular game mode, meaning no saves, however, you can play for as long as you want, as many times as you want!

Building

Spend your hard-earned money on buying up to 3 objects per day, unlocking new tiles and rearranging your shop.

Colour Palette

Customise every detail of your shop, even down to the colours used. With 8 changeable colours used throughout, alter these to fit your style and make the shop your own.

Serve Customers

Customers will come in throughout the day, rummaging through the shelves before going to the counter to be served by you or your temporary hired staff, giving a number of coins.

Restock Shelves

Once the customer has taken a book, the shelf will need to be restocked. You can see taken books by the red outline.
3054050.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 日语, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 俄语, 简体中文
*具有完全音频支持的语言
